keywords.name: mass
keywords.description: List gridpoint location, mass and block linkage.

keywords.name: position
keywords.description: List gridpoint position in model coordinates.

keywords.name: velocity
keywords.description: List information about boundary conditions, according to the following keywords. Dynamic added masses List displacement at boundary. Dynamic free field information List forces at boundary. List reaction forces at any gridpoint with a fixed velocity. List reactions at fixed velocity points in the form of average tractions on the surrounding faces. List boundary condition state specified by boundary code ix, iy, iz. 0 free 1 stress (or force) 2 viscous 3 velocity List total of forces applied on the \(x\) -, \(y\) - and \(z\) -boundaries. List velocities applied to boundary

keywords.name: stress
keywords.description: List gridpoint stresses (only for high-order elements).

keywords.name: thermal
keywords.description: List gridpoint thermal mass, temperature state, temperature change and heat.
